translations.en: a slender man with boots that come up to his thighs.
translations.zh: 一位身形纖細、靴子高至大腿的男子。

translations.en: "Don't you know it's rude to interrupt a man when he's brawling?"
translations.zh: 「汝難道不知道，打架的時候打擾別人是很失禮的嗎？」

translations.en: "Hello there, $G."
"Care to join me in a drink?"
translations.zh: 「要不要和吾喝一杯？」

translations.en: "Not a mead drinker, I guess." He shrugs.
translations.zh: 「想是不喝蜂蜜酒。」他聳了聳肩。

translations.en: He hands you a mug for a swallow.
translations.zh: 他遞給汝一杯讓汝喝一口。

translations.en: It is warmed @mead, sweet and bubbly, with a cinnamon stick in it.
translations.zh: 那是溫熱的@蜂蜜酒，甜蜜起泡，裡頭插著一根肉桂棒。

translations.en: "Comes from Verity Isle," he says.
translations.zh: 「產自誠真島，」他說道。

translations.en: "It's mostly made of honey. Ask a brewer."
translations.zh: 「主要原料是蜂蜜。去問釀酒師吧。」

translations.en: "Jerris is my name. And yourself?"
translations.zh: 「吾名傑里斯。汝呢？」

translations.en: "Pleased to make your acquaintance."
translations.zh: 「幸會。」

translations.en: "Some day I hope to join @Zellivan's Stalwarts and be a guard."
translations.zh: 「有朝一日吾希望加入@澤利凡的精銳衛隊，成為一名衛士。」

translations.en: "When that last earthquake struck, I was pinned 'neath a great tree branch."
translations.zh: 「上次地震來臨時，吾被一根巨大的樹枝壓住了。」

translations.en: "Lord Zellivan himself hoisted it up while a guard pulled me clear."
translations.zh: 「澤利凡爵主親自將它撐起，衛士將吾拖了出來。」

translations.en: "It was a rat, as sure as the world is flat."
translations.zh: 「那是一隻老鼠，正如大地是平的一樣確定。」

translations.en: "Darndest thing, too."
translations.zh: 「真是怪事。」

translations.en: "Nomaan dropped the rune and the rat took it into a little @hole."
translations.zh: 「諾曼掉了符文，老鼠把它帶進了一個小@洞裡。」

translations.en: "It's in the refrain of the @song."
translations.zh: 「就在那首@歌的副歌裡。」

translations.en: "Well, I'd rather not sing alone. Get Culham to play it."
translations.zh: 「嗯，吾不想一個人唱。去找卡翰來演奏。」

translations.en: "Goodbye."
translations.zh: 「再見。」

translations.en: "Sorry, $G.  I can't help ye with that."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，$G。吾無法在此事上助汝。」

translations.en: "It's right there. On the north wall. See it?"
translations.zh: 「就在那裡。北牆上。看到了嗎？」

translations.en: "Look carefully, $G. Ye will see it if ye keep on looking."
translations.zh: 「仔細看，$G。只要持續尋找，汝必能見到。」

translations.en: Shamino points to a spot west of the bar where the wall meets the ground. "There it is."
translations.zh: 夏米諾指向酒吧西側牆根的一個位置。「就在那裡。」

translations.en: "Obviously a rat hole."
translations.zh: 「顯然是個鼠洞。」

translator_notes: 傑里斯是個想加入澤利凡衛隊的年輕人，語氣直爽。蜂蜜酒是月華城的特產。他引用「大地是平的」是對以弗美里迪斯的呼應笑話。
